title: Battle of Praesitlyn

{{Quote|This is the move that will win the war for us. They'll never know what hit them, those technicians and their security forces. They'll soon all be dead—or be assets belonging to us.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]]|<ref name="JT" />}}
The '''Battle of Praesitlyn''' was fought between [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces over [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] and the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]] in c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Its CIS codename was '''Operation Case White'''.

==The battle==
===Operation Case White===
{{Quote|As we speak, a fleet of one hundred twenty-six ships, seventy-five of them capital ships, is investing Sluis Van to block any reinforcements from that sector. I am at this very moment landing a force of fifty thousand battle droids on Praesitlyn in a feint to divert the garrison from the Intergalactic Communications Center. When that operation is fully under way, I will land the main force, composed of, give or take, a million battle droids, crush the defenders in a containment maneuver, and capture the center intact. I have two hundred ships in my invasion fleet. This operation cannot possibly fail. I guarantee you that within twenty-four standard hours of the commencement of Operation Case White, Praesitlyn will be ours. We will sit firmly astride the communications link that connects the worlds of the Republic. Our forces will be poised at this strategic crossroads to strike without warning at any of the Republic's allies. Most important, our control of Praesitlyn will be a vibroblade thrust directly at Coruscant itself.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]], to [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]|<ref name="JT" />}}
[[File:Jedi_Trial.jpg|thumb|left|Anakin Skywalker, Erk H'Arman and Odie Subu, three key Republic figures of the battle]]
Despite possessing the state-of-the-art communications complex known as the [[Intergalactic Communications Center]], [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]] had few defenses. Having recently taken the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] had stationed a garrison of fifty thousand [[Clone trooper/Legends|troops]] to defend the communications node. In response, [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] ordered [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Pors Tonith/Legends|Pors Tonith]] of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] to initiate Operation Case White, the codename for the plan to retake Praesitlyn. From the bridge of his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] ''[[Corpulentus]]'', Tonith commanded a fleet of 200 [[Starship/Legends|ships]] to Praesitlyn and sent another flotilla of 75 [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and 51 support ships to blockade [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]].

With the Republic forces on Praesitlyn cut off from reinforcements, Pors Tonith's fleet attacked the planet, landing a force of fifty thousand [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] to lure the garrison, under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Khamar]], into an engagement. This proved to be a trap, and Tonith landed a droid army one million strong behind Khamar's forces and completely destroyed them. Two [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], recon scout [[Odie Subu]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Erk H'Arman]] managed to escape the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and flee into the desert. Without its garrison, the communications center easily fell to the Separatists, and Admiral Tonith set up his headquarters inside the base. Operation Case White was a success.

A system-wide jamming field transmitted from a modified [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Droid Control Ship]] prevented the Republic garrison from sending out a distress call, and the rest of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] remained unaware of what had transpired. However, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zozridor Slayke]], leader of the [[Loyalist/Legends|Loyalist]] volunteer army [[Sons and Daughters of Freedom|Freedom's Sons]], learned of the Praesitlyn conquest and alerted [[Republic High Command/Legends|Republic High Command]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The arrogant captain was not patient enough to wait for Republic reinforcements and made the brash decision of attacking the Separatists with his private militia. Slayke managed to land his forces, but was overwhelmed by the superior [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid army]] and forced to retreat into a fortified redoubt near the Intergalactic Communications Center and await the Republic reinforcements.

On Coruscant, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] and [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were assigned a [[Republic Navy/Legends|naval battle group]] with a contingent of 20,000 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and tasked with the recapture of Praesitlyn.

===Republic cavalry===
Back on Praesitlyn, Pors Tonith launched an all-out assault on the Freedom's Sons redoubt, managing to completely decimate Slayke's air support and artillery. But before he could completely destroy the bunker, the Republic task force arrived in system and moved to break the Separatists' orbital blockade. General Halcyon commanded the battle from the [[Centax-class heavy frigate|''Centax''-class frigate]] [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']] and Skywalker oversaw the landing force from the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Neelian]]''. The ''Ranger'' quickly dispatched of the jamming ship with a volley of high-yield [[MG1-A proton torpedo]]es, but the [[Confederate Navy/Legends|Confederate Navy]] counterattacked. The heavy cruiser ''[[By'ynium]]'' was the first ship destroyed by Separatist fire, and soon droid [[Skirmisher ship|skirmishers]] boarded Halcyon's flagship, forcing the crew to scuttle the ship. The Republic ships were eventually able to drive away the Separatist warships, taking control of the skies above Praesitlyn.

The military transports of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] landed in four waves: combat engineers, infantry, then Skywalker's and Halcyon's clone troopers. Admiral Tonith was forced to withdraw his droids from the attack on the Freedom's Sons base and rearrange them into a defensive arrangement around the mesa the Intergalactic Communications Center was situated upon. He then contacted Ventress and lobbied her for reinforcements.

The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used Zozridor Slayke's command center as their base of operations and the captain agreed to place his surviving forces under Republic command. While planning their next move, they received a message from Pors Tonith: the survivors of the original garrison were being held hostage in the communications center and would be executed unless the Republic ceased its attack. Halcyon, Skywalker, and Slayke eventually decided to carry out a feint at the center of the droid formations, while their main force would attack from the Separatists' right flank. Unfortunately, their [[Biker Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|clone scouts]] were unable to relay vital intelligence – that the droid army's right flank was heavily reinforced – back to HQ before the attack began. Skywalker acted as field commander for the operation, and led the clone army from a transport vehicle. The attack ended in disaster for the Republic forces, as they were unable to breach the Separatists' multiple defensive lines and took heavy losses, forcing Skywalker to order a tactical retreat. The Separatists also tapped into the Republic battlenet and ordered their artillery to fire upon several clone battalions trying to take a droid fortification. General Halcyon then called off the attack.

===Endgame===
{{Quote|It's brilliant. It'll probably get you killed, but it's brilliant nonetheless.|[[Zozridor Slayke]], referring to Anakin's Plan B|<ref name="JT" />}}
[[File:Anakin_Skywalker_NEC.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Anakin Skywalker piloting the ''Azure Angel II'' during the battle]]

With the failure of their frontal assault, the Loyalist forces were forced to rethink their strategy. Anakin Skywalker suggested that he lead a [[Clone commando/Legends|commando]] unit into the Intergalactic Communications Center and attempt to liberate the hostages and capture the Separatists' command bunker. General Halcyon and captain Slayke agreed and Skywalker began his rescue operation.

A contingent of a few [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC troopers]] and a couple of squads clone commandos accompanied Anakin in two transports to the communications base, and easily secured a landing zone. Once inside the base, Skywalker and his unit easily fought through the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|security droids]] and managed to liberate the prisoners, but [[Reija Momen]], chief administrator of the base, was killed by a battle droid. Enraged by the murder of another innocent, Anakin let his hate reign free and set off on a rampage against the surviving droids. The freed hostages and the commando team returned to the transports, but they were attacked by droids and were forced to leave without Skywalker. The young Jedi continued to pave a path of destruction toward Pors Tonith's headquarters, and he was able to cut through the bunker's doors with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Inside, Skywalker forced the Separatist admiral to surrender, but hesitated to execute him when he heard the voice of [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] telling him to yield. With the droids deactivated, it appeared that the Battle of Praesitlyn was nearing its end.

Unfortunately for the Republic, Pors Tonith's long-awaited reinforcements arrived in system just seconds after the admiral transmitted his surrender. A large Separatist fleet used a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] to sneak up on the Republic blockade and spring a surprise attack. Halcyon and Skywalker boarded their [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Jedi starfighters]] and joined the space battle. During the battle, Skywalker miraculously managed to destroy the Separatist flagship's bridge by making a suicidal attack run in his customized starfighter, the ''[[Azure Angel II]]''. To Halcyon, it appeared that the [[Chosen One/Legends|Chosen One]] had perished in the subsequent explosion. Through superior tactics, the Republic fleet was able force the Separatist armada to withdraw. The Battle of Praesitlyn was finally won.

==Aftermath==
{{Quote|You mind telling us how you did that?|[[Nejaa Halcyon]], referring to Anakin's microjump|<ref name="JT" />}}
[[File:Tonith_JT.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Pors Tonith, Confederacy strategist]]
Nejaa Halcyon returned to the surface and was congratulated by Zozridor Slayke. Incredibly, Anakin Skywalker soon reappeared, having been able to avoid the Separatist flagship's destruction by making a hyperspace microjump using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Afterwards, Odie Subu and Erk H'Arman asked Anakin to preside over their marriage ceremony. After the Praesitlyn battle, Jedi Masters [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] decided that for Anakin's actions in the Republic's victory, he would be promoted to a full-fledged Jedi Knight when he returned to Coruscant; Skywalker's master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] had also said that he would speak in favor of his apprentice's knighthood when he returned.<ref name="JT" /> Before they could return to Coruscant however, Skywalker and Kenobi were both diverted to [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] [[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|and then]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]].<ref name="YDR">''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''</ref>

Two percent of the clone casualties came from dehydration. The Republic army consumed 2000 metric tons of supplies per day of operation. Resupply could only occur at a rate of 1000 tons per day, and with a high number of transport casualties.

In truth, [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]] had engineered the battle, desiring to draw Anakin further into the thrall of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]].
